current_metadata.name: Packed
current_metadata.subtitle: Packing checklist
current_metadata.promotional_text: Build reusable packing lists for trips and check off what is ready before you leave.
current_metadata.description:
Packed helps you prepare for trips with a simple packing checklist.

Create a list, check off what is ready, and reuse your packing plan for future travel.
It is designed for lightweight travel preparation without accounts or complex planning.

search_intents: plan what to pack before a trip

English-speaking users tend to search for category terms such as
"packing list" and "travel checklist". The metadata should cover
checklist, packing, trip, and reminder intent without claiming that
the app guarantees a perfect trip.

fields.name: Packed
fields.subtitle: packing list reminder
fields.keywords: packing list,travel checklist,suitcase list,trip planner,vacation packing,suitcase,vacation
fields.promotional_text: Build reusable packing lists for trips and check off what is ready before you leave.
fields.description:
Packed locale-specific ASO proposal.

Highlights:
- Title, subtitle, and keywords designed for this locale's search behavior
- Natural wording balanced with relevant search terms
- Product meaning and compliance constraints preserved without direct translation

Review final description wording against actual features, screenshots, and App Review-safe claims.

Product context used for this proposal:
# Product Spec

## One-line Description

Packed helps users manage reusable packing groups and check items for the day.

## Core Value

- Reduce forgotten items through repeatable daily checklists.
- Keep packing setup lightweight.

## Target Users

- People preparing for school, work, travel, gym, or daily routines.

## Core Operation

- Create a group, add items, check today's packed state, and optionally get reminders.

## Free Features

- Packing groups and items.
- Daily check state.
- Settings and local reminders.

## Paid Feature Candidates

- Unknown. Possible candidates: unlimited groups, templates, themes.

## Non-goals

- Inventory management.
- Shared household/team packing.
- Server sync in v1.

proposals.rationale: Prioritizes high-fit category and intent keywords for discoverability.
proposals.search_intent: Users searching broad category and use-case terms for this locale.
risks: Broader category terms may be more competitive.

fields.promotional_text: Build reusable packing lists for trips and check off what is ready before you leave.

Product context used for this proposal:
# Product Spec

## One-line Description

Packed helps users manage reusable packing groups and check items for the day.

## Core Value

- Reduce forgotten items through repeatable daily checklists.
- Keep packing setup lightweight.

## Target Users

- People preparing for school, work, travel, gym, or daily routines.

## Core Operation

- Create a group, add items, check today's packed state, and optionally get reminders.

## Free Features

- Packing groups and items.
- Daily check state.
- Settings and local reminders.

## Paid Feature Candidates

- Unknown. Possible candidates: unlimited groups, templates, themes.

## Non-goals

- Inventory management.
- Shared household/team packing.
- Server sync in v1.

proposals.rationale: Uses efficient and less crowded terms to cover narrower search intent.
proposals.search_intent: Users searching narrower long-tail use cases and specific workflows.
risks: Long-tail terms can have lower demand.

avoid_terms.reason: ranking claims are not allowed in App Store metadata
superlative claims invite App Review pushback

current_metadata.name: Packed
current_metadata.subtitle: 旅行の持ち物リスト
current_metadata.promotional_text: 旅行や出張の持ち物をリスト化。出発前に準備できたものをすばやく確認できます。
current_metadata.description:
Packedは、旅行や出張の持ち物を整理するためのシンプルなチェックリストアプリです。

持ち物をリストにして、準備できたものをチェック。次の旅行でも同じリストを見直せます。
子連れ旅行、出張、短い外出など、出発前の確認を軽くしたいときに使えます。

seed_keywords: 子連れ旅行 持ち物
search_intents: 旅行前に忘れ物を防ぎたい
出張の持ち物を確認したい
子連れ旅行の準備をリスト化したい

日本語では「持ち物リスト」「旅行準備」「旅行チェックリスト」のように、
旅行前の不安や忘れ物防止の意図で検索されやすい。en-USの直訳ではなく、
出張や子連れ旅行など日本語で自然な検索語をkeywordsで広く拾う。

search_terms: 子連れ旅行 持ち物

keyword_candidates.term: 子連れ旅行 持ち物

scored_keywords.term: 子連れ旅行 持ち物

fields.name: Packed
fields.subtitle: 出張・子連れ旅行・持ち物リスト
fields.keywords: 忘れ物防止,パッキングリスト,出張 持ち物,旅行準備,子連れ旅行 持ち物,旅行チェックリスト
fields.promotional_text: 旅行や出張の持ち物をリスト化。出発前に準備できたものをすばやく確認できます。
fields.description:
Packedのlocale別ASO提案です。

主な内容:
- このlocaleの検索意図に合わせたtitle/subtitle/keywords
- 自然な表現と検索語の両立
- base localeの直訳ではなく、機能意味と禁止表現を保った再設計

説明文は、実際の機能、スクリーンショット、App Review上の安全な表現に合わせて人間が最終確認してください。
